@symtorch/core.breakingChangePolicy: breaking changes require changelog and API surface doc updates

@symtorch/nn.breakingChangePolicy: breaking changes require finite-difference or behavior tests

@symtorch/logic.breakingChangePolicy: schema changes require versioned contract tests

@symtorch/agent.breakingChangePolicy: serialized decision, ledger, and trace snapshot changes require fixture updates

@symtorch/webgpu.breakingChangePolicy: kernel and parity surface may change until backend dispatch stabilizes
